text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Are there any books that<n>might make
for good drawing<n>materi—agh! Oh crap! There's no
time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The deadline for my manuscript! I'm<n>not gonna
make it for the con!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Trainer?! How long have you<n>been standing
there?!
choice_data_list: You weren't at training, so I came looking for you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
AAGH! What've I done! I've<n>disgraced the entire
racing world!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's already properly<n>mortified, so I let
her off with a light<n>warning.
